und.value:
STMO Sarah the loved wife of the Reverend Robert Denny ? Who died ....?
Mourn not for her while faith with upraised eye
Surveys the realms of immortality
That sing immanuels love and endless songs.
Mourn not for her, She rests upon a shore
Where pain and sorrow ne'er can reach her more.
Her ransomed spirit dwells with Christ above
And now she surely knows that "God is Love"
Yet who can chide the burning tears that flow,
For one so justly dear so soon laid low
By death's cold hand - the sorrow is too dear,
For nature in its weakness not to weep.
But faith assures thee, nor assures in vain,
That thou shalt meet the lost of love again
In that blest region of celestial day,
where God shall wipe all tears of grief away
And sing with thee in one eternal strain
Worthy the lamb that once for us was slain.

Her goodness all derived from him alone.

To smile in anguish and rejoice in death.
